user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Focused project to improve piano skills. Includes daily practice routine; primary task: practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

insertion_point.reasoning: Creating a new learning project under the 'Learning' category and appending it to the end. Description captures the requested daily 30-minute scales practice so the intent is recorded for subsequent task creation.
